context.description: Implement email notification service for FCRA dispute deadline reminders (Day 1, Day 3, Day 25 of 30-day response window), mailing dispatch confirmations, and letter generation confirmations. Uses Celery beat scheduler for timed reminders. SendGrid as email provider.
acceptance_criteria: backend/services/email_service.py implements: send_transactional_email(to_email, template_name, context_data) -> bool, with 4 templates: 'letter_generated', 'mailing_dispatched', 'fcra_deadline_reminder', 'dispute_update'
backend/workers/email_worker.py defines: @celery_app.task send_notification_email(user_id, notification_type, metadata) - fetches user email, calls email_service, writes notification_log
Celery beat schedule in celery_app.py: check_fcra_deadlines task runs daily at 9am UTC - queries disputes sent 1, 3, and 25 days ago, enqueues deadline reminder emails
notification_log table written for every email sent: (user_id, type, sent_at, metadata {template, subject, lob_letter_id if applicable})
email_service.py: uses SendGrid Python SDK, reads SENDGRID_API_KEY and FROM_EMAIL from settings
Email subject lines: 'Your dispute letters have been generated', 'Your letters are on the way!', 'FCRA Reminder: Day X of 30 - Bureau response expected soon'
Email delivery rate target: >98% (tracked via SendGrid delivery events; log delivery failures to notification_log metadata)
Verify with: manually call send_notification_email.delay(user_id, 'letter_generated', {}) and check email received
implementation_approach: Step 1: Create backend/services/email_service.py with SendGrid client
Step 2: Create 4 email template strings (inline for now, HTML formatted)
Step 3: Create backend/workers/email_worker.py with send_notification_email Celery task
Step 4: Add Celery beat schedule to backend/workers/celery_app.py for daily deadline check
Step 5: Create check_fcra_deadlines Celery task that queries disputes table for Day 1/3/25
Step 6: Integrate email dispatch into mailing route (IMPL-008): call email_worker.send_notification_email.delay() after Lob dispatch
Step 7: Integrate email dispatch into letter generation flow (IMPL-011)
pre_analysis: Read backend/workers/celery_app.py (created in IMPL-003) for Celery app instance
Read backend/services/database_optimizer.py for Supabase query pattern to use in deadline check
Refer to docs/PRD-Technical-Architecture.md Section on email notification infrastructure
